answer:
Coda makes its REST API available to all users at no additional charge, regardless of whether you are on a free or paid workspace plan [1]. While API usage is free, access is subject to the permissions of the user associated with the API token [1].

For most API actions, the token owner must be a Doc Maker or Admin within the workspace [1]. If a workspace allows members to create docs, an Editor using an API key may be automatically promoted to a Doc Maker upon executing certain endpoints, such as creating a document [1]. You can manage your workspace and billing settings through Coda's self-serve account portal [2].
